title: chrysosplenium pilosum var. flaviflorum
intro: Chrysosplenium pilosum var. flaviflorum is a rare, variable, and endemic species of flowering plant in the family Saxifragaceae. Also known as yellow-flowered golden Saxifrage, it is a perennial herb with yellow flowers, native to the mountains of Yunnan Province, China. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Chrysosplenium pilosum var. flaviflorum include treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, and it can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal purposes.
